name: BBQ Baked Beef Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Sprinkle ribs with salt and pepper; place in a single layer in a large roasting pan. Roast for 1 hour, until nicely browned and some of the fat is rendered, turning once. Transfer ribs to a large plate; drain all but 1 tablespoon drippings from the pan. Stir in garlic, carrots, and onion into the drippings. Return to oven and roast for 15 to 20 minutes.
2. Reduce oven temperature to 325°F. In the pan, stir together barbecue sauce, tomato sauce, broth, and 1/2 cup water. Return ribs to the pan, spooning some sauce over them. Tightly cover with foil. Bake ribs for 1 3/4 hours, or until very tender, turning once. Skim fat off the surface.
Dinner Plan:
Remove half of the ribs and sauce to a microwave-safe container; cool, then freeze for later use. Serve the remaining ribs. (Approximate microwave times: Defrost for 25 minutes; reheat for 6 minutes, shifting ribs once or twice.)
